generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDARUST110LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-110LX 2‑D LiDAR mounted on the 1/10‑scale autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing RGB‑D images"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board vehicle state sensors delivering ego speed and steering‑angle telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateTelemetryTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data Transmitted)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDARUST110LX
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

// C10: Data objects
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point‑clouds generated by the Hokuyo LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth images captured by the RealSense camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry containing ego speed (m/s) and steering angle (rad)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateTelemetryTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance ClusteringAndTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering followed by a Kalman filter to generate object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO‑15622 compliant ACC model that detects lead vehicle and computes speed set‑point"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cross‑System Data Translation FE for serialization, unit conversion and DDS messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService,
                     ComputationOffloadingService,
                     RemoteManagementService,
                     ReportingService,
                     Visualization3DService
]

instance ClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity implementing clustering & tracking using the DBSCAN/Kalman model"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService,
                     ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity that executes the Adaptive Cruise Control algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService,
                     RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity that generates time‑series performance reports stored in SQL"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity providing 3‑D visualization of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables Visualization3DService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity translating UI commands into actuation messages"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI service visualizing real‑time speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentSpeedInsight,
                     SteeringAngleInsight,
                     ObjectTracksInsight,
                     PredictedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs the ACC algorithm in the cloud and returns desired speed set‑point"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputedSpeedSetpointInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI service allowing operators to enable/disable ACC, set target speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction,
                     DisableACCAction,
                     SetTargetSpeedAction,
                     EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of time‑series reports stored in a SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceReportInsight
]

instance Visualization3DService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization of the vehicle and its sensed environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides Environment3DInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance CurrentSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current ego speed displayed on the operator UI"
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current steering angle displayed on the operator UI"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time object tracks derived from LiDAR clustering and tracking"
]

instance PredictedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected vehicle path based on current speed and steering angle"
]

instance ComputedSpeedSetpointInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Desired speed set‑point computed by the ACC model"
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated performance metrics and diagnostics stored in SQL"
]

instance Environment3DInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3‑D rendered view of vehicle, point‑clouds and depth images"
]

// C17: Actions
instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to enable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetTargetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator sets a target speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator triggers emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorVoltageActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder ESC motor voltage command interface exposed through the Actuation FE"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator exposed through the Actuation FE"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends actuation commands back to the PT, including desired speed, enable/disable ACC, emergency‑brake signals, and steering adjustments. These commands are serialized and unit‑converted by the Data Translation FE and delivered over the same Wi‑Fi link to the Actuation FE, which drives the motor controller and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with a hard latency bound of ≤ 100 ms for the round‑trip vehicle‑to‑DT communication (requirement R7) and requires clock synchronization across all DTS components within 100 ms (requirement R8), ensuring near‑real‑time synchronization for ACC offloading."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation consists of the three ISO 23247‑derived entities interconnected via a ROS 2 network internally and a Wi‑Fi link externally; each Functional Entity is realized as an independent ROS 2 package, providing modular, loosely‑coupled services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The case study focuses on the operational stage of the vehicle, where the DT is used for real‑time monitoring, control and maintenance; design‑time stages are not explicitly described."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "To guarantee fidelity, the DT enforces a ≤ 100 ms communication latency and clock sync, uses high‑fidelity sensor models (raw LiDAR point clouds) and validated ACC logic per ISO 15622. Real‑time validation is achieved by comparing DT‑computed speed commands against vehicle response."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication uses ROS 2 DDS over Wi‑Fi; the Data Translation FE serializes messages and performs unit conversions. The optional use of OPC UA is mentioned but not implemented."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Physical Twin Entity runs on the vehicle’s onboard Jetson Orin Nano; the Digital Twin Entity runs on external compute resources (cloud or workstation); the User Entity UI runs on a separate client machine. Each entity is packaged as its own ROS 2 node set."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) reference architecture, adopts ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, references ISO/IEC 30173:2023 for DT terminology, and utilizes the ROS 2 standard for middleware; OPC UA is cited as a possible implementation for the Data Translation FE."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system is described as safety‑critical; latency and clock‑sync requirements support safe operation. Remote management commands are limited to enable/disable ACC, speed set‑point changes, and emergency braking, but explicit security mechanisms (authentication, encryption) are not detailed."
]
